creator: gavin.atkinson@ury.york.ac.uk
text:
Additionally, this page should probably be moved from ppc.sgml to 
powerpc.sgml to match the official name of the platform.  The references 
to "FreeBSD/ppc" would also need correcting on the page if this were to be 
done, I am happy to do that and to create a redirect page to live at 
ppc.html if people are in agreement.

Gavin
